title: Traffic diversions at Langeberg Mall intersection on Louis Fourie Road
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Various traffic diversions will be implemented in front of the Langeberg Mall on Louis Fourie Road while construction work is underway on the Mossel Bay side of the intersection.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Various traffic diversions will be implemented in front of the Langeberg Mall on Louis Fourie Road while construction work is underway on the Mossel Bay side of the intersection."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Commencement date: 20 February (weather permitting)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Anticipated Duration: 4 weeks","html":"• Anticipated Duration: 4 weeks"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• The temporary slip lane exiting the Mall will be closed on 23 February.","html":"• The temporary slip lane exiting the Mall will be closed on 23 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Please follow temporary traffic signage.","html":"• Please follow temporary traffic signage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Thank you for your patience while construction is underway.","html":"• Thank you for your patience while construction is underway."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safer, for you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
